scripts.test:buc: npm run clean:allure && newman run BUC-Sincronizacion.json --folder "BUC - Sincronización" -r allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results
scripts.report:allure: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.all: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:buc && npm run report:allure
